---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What does your current workflow look like, and where does Gate fall short?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the change you'd like to see. Be concrete about:

- Which module(s) in `gate/` would change
- Config or CLI surface (if any)
- How a user would opt in, if behavior change is risky

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you thought about, and why you rejected them.

## Additional Context

Links to related issues, prior art in other tools, or any other context.
